file.content:
# Fixture: network-graph
## Task
Small network with ~30 nodes colored by community. Force-directed or circular layout.
## Inputs
- data.json: {nodes[{id, community}], edges[{source,target}], communities}
## Outputs
- figure.pdf, figure.png; caption.tex; gen_figure.py
## Hints
- networkx + matplotlib is fine.
- Avoid hairball: tune edge alpha and node size.

delta.text: have all the data. I'll write the generation

content.text: Now I have all the data. I'll write the generation script.

delta.partial_json:
{"file_path": "/Users/mjm/MinionsOS/outline/ExperimentsOfMinionsos/FigureDraw2/sessions/awesome-writing-prompts/network-graph/20260524T165223Z/workspace/gen_figure.py", "content": "import json
import numpy as np
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use("Agg")
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import networkx as nx

with open("data.json") as f:
    data = json.load(f)

G = nx.Graph()
community_map = {}
for node in data["nodes"]:
    G.add_node(node["id"])
    community_map[node["id"]] = node["community"]

for edge in data["edges"]:
    G.add_edge(edge["source"], edge["target"])

n_communities = data["communities"]
palette = ["#E63946", "#457B9D", "#2A9D8F", "#E9C46A"]
node_colors = [palette[community_map[n]] for n in G.nodes()]

np.random.seed(42)
pos = nx.spring_layout(G, seed=42, k=1.8 / np.sqrt(len(G.nodes())), iterations=100)

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7, 7))
fig.patch.set_facecolor("white")
ax.set_facecolor("#F8F9FA")

nx.draw_networkx_edges(
    G, pos, ax=ax,
    alpha=0.25,
    width=0.9,
    edge_color="#888888",
)

nx.draw_networkx_nodes(
    G, pos, ax=ax,
    node_color=node_colors,
    node_size=260,
    linewidths=0.8,
    edgecolors="white",
)

nx.draw_networkx_labels(
    G, pos, ax=ax,
    font_size=7,
    font_color="white",
    font_weight="bold",
)

legend_handles = [
    mpatches.Patch(color=palette[i], label=f"Community {i}")
    for i in range(n_communities)
]
ax.legend(
    handles=legend_handles,
    loc="lower right",
    framealpha=0.9,
    fontsize=9,
    title="Community",
    title_fontsize=9,
)

ax.set_title("Community-Colored Network Graph (30 nodes, 4 communities)", fontsize=11, pad=10)
ax.axis("off")
plt.tight_layout()

plt.savefig("figure.pdf", dpi=150, bbox_inches="tight")
plt.savefig("figure.png", dpi=150, bbox_inches="tight")
plt.savefig("figure.svg", bbox_inches="tight")
print("Saved figure.pdf, figure.png, figure.svg")
"}

input.content:
import json
import numpy as np
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use("Agg")
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import networkx as nx

with open("data.json") as f:
    data = json.load(f)

G = nx.Graph()
community_map = {}
for node in data["nodes"]:
    G.add_node(node["id"])
    community_map[node["id"]] = node["community"]

for edge in data["edges"]:
    G.add_edge(edge["source"], edge["target"])

n_communities = data["communities"]
palette = ["#E63946", "#457B9D", "#2A9D8F", "#E9C46A"]
node_colors = [palette[community_map[n]] for n in G.nodes()]

np.random.seed(42)
pos = nx.spring_layout(G, seed=42, k=1.8 / np.sqrt(len(G.nodes())), iterations=100)

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7, 7))
fig.patch.set_facecolor("white")
ax.set_facecolor("#F8F9FA")

nx.draw_networkx_edges(
    G, pos, ax=ax,
    alpha=0.25,
    width=0.9,
    edge_color="#888888",
)

nx.draw_networkx_nodes(
    G, pos, ax=ax,
    node_color=node_colors,
    node_size=260,
    linewidths=0.8,
    edgecolors="white",
)

nx.draw_networkx_labels(
    G, pos, ax=ax,
    font_size=7,
    font_color="white",
    font_weight="bold",
)

legend_handles = [
    mpatches.Patch(color=palette[i], label=f"Community {i}")
    for i in range(n_communities)
]
ax.legend(
    handles=legend_handles,
    loc="lower right",
    framealpha=0.9,
    fontsize=9,
    title="Community",
    title_fontsize=9,
)

ax.set_title("Community-Colored Network Graph (30 nodes, 4 communities)", fontsize=11, pad=10)
ax.axis("off")
plt.tight_layout()

plt.savefig("figure.pdf", dpi=150, bbox_inches="tight")
plt.savefig("figure.png", dpi=150, bbox_inches="tight")
plt.savefig("figure.svg", bbox_inches="tight")
print("Saved figure.pdf, figure.png, figure.svg")

import json
import numpy as np
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use("Agg")
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import networkx as nx

with open("data.json") as f:
    data = json.load(f)

G = nx.Graph()
community_map = {}
for node in data["nodes"]:
    G.add_node(node["id"])
    community_map[node["id"]] = node["community"]

for edge in data["edges"]:
    G.add_edge(edge["source"], edge["target"])

n_communities = data["communities"]
palette = ["#E63946", "#457B9D", "#2A9D8F", "#E9C46A"]
node_colors = [palette[community_map[n]] for n in G.nodes()]

np.random.seed(42)
pos = nx.spring_layout(G, seed=42, k=1.8 / np.sqrt(len(G.nodes())), iterations=100)

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7, 7))
fig.patch.set_facecolor("white")
ax.set_facecolor("#F8F9FA")

nx.draw_networkx_edges(
    G, pos, ax=ax,
    alpha=0.25,
    width=0.9,
    edge_color="#888888",
)

nx.draw_networkx_nodes(
    G, pos, ax=ax,
    node_color=node_colors,
    node_size=260,
    linewidths=0.8,
    edgecolors="white",
)

nx.draw_networkx_labels(
    G, pos, ax=ax,
    font_size=7,
    font_color="white",
    font_weight="bold",
)

legend_handles = [
    mpatches.Patch(color=palette[i], label=f"Community {i}")
    for i in range(n_communities)
]
ax.legend(
    handles=legend_handles,
    loc="lower right",
    framealpha=0.9,
    fontsize=9,
    title="Community",
    title_fontsize=9,
)

ax.set_title("Community-Colored Network Graph (30 nodes, 4 communities)", fontsize=11, pad=10)
ax.axis("off")
plt.tight_layout()

plt.savefig("figure.pdf", dpi=150, bbox_inches="tight")
plt.savefig("figure.png", dpi=150, bbox_inches="tight")
plt.savefig("figure.svg", bbox_inches="tight")
print("Saved figure.pdf, figure.png, figure.svg")

Nodes are arranged using the Fruchterman--Reingold algorithm (NetworkX \\texttt{spring\\_layout}, seed 42). Edge transparency ($\\alpha = 0.25$) reduces visual clutter. Node colour encodes community membership: red (0), blue (1), teal (2), yellow (3). Cross-community edges are visible, indicating inter-community connectivity.}\n"}

content.text:
All four required files are now in the workspace:

- **`figure.pdf`** — vector output
- **`figure.png`** — raster output (150 dpi)
- **`figure.svg`** — optional SVG
- **`gen_figure.py`** — reproducible generation script
- **`caption.tex`** — LaTeX caption

The figure shows 30 nodes arranged by Fruchterman-Reingold force-directed layout, colored by 4 communities (red, blue, teal, yellow), with low-alpha edges to avoid hairball clutter.
